pharma.title: Bombay HC backs GSK in Paxil trademark row against Shreya Life Sciences
pharma.summary: The Indian subsidiary of the UK-based GSK PLC had urged the court to cancel the mark used by the local company in pharmaceutical and medicinal preparations. It argued that despite getting the mark more than two decades ago, Shreya Life Sciences had never used...

pharma.title: India's medical tourism market to nearly double to $16.2 bn by 2030: Govt
pharma.summary: India is emerging as a leading hub for 'Medical Value Travel' (MVT), with the medical tourism market estimated at about $8.7 billion in 2025 to nearly double to $16.2 billion by 2030, the government said on Saturday.
pharma.thbAction: Use the article as an entry point to pitch THB's commercial visibility layer for territory planning, account prioritization, and next-best-action for pharma leadership teams.

pharma.title: Delhi HC Upholds Ban on Unapproved FDC Drugs, Backs DCGI Action

providers.title: NMC Healthcare opens new multi-specialty clinic in Al Riyadh City, Abu Dhabi
providers.summary: The facility aims to improve access to primary and specialised healthcare services for residents within the rapidly growing residential community.
